channel.title: Zeitschrift für Naturforschung B
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Zeitschrift für Naturforschung B

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Dirk Hollenwäger, Niklas Kölbl, Alexander Nitzer, Valentin Bockmair, Andreas J. Kornath DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/znb-2024-frontmatter10-11

item.title: In this issue
item.description: Article by Dirk Hollenwäger, Niklas Kölbl, Alexander Nitzer, Valentin Bockmair, Andreas J. Kornath DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/znb-2024-graphabs10-11

item.title: A base-promoted synthesis of 3,4-dihydro-2(1H)-quinazolinones
item.description: Article by Dirk Hollenwäger, Niklas Kölbl, Alexander Nitzer, Valentin Bockmair, Andreas J. Kornath DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/znb-2024-0045

item.title: The stannides SrPdSn and m-BaPtSn
item.description: Article by Dirk Hollenwäger, Niklas Kölbl, Alexander Nitzer, Valentin Bockmair, Andreas J. Kornath DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/znb-2024-0057

item.title: Comparative electron density study on three compounds obtained from Ilex cornuta leaves and known for their anti-adipogenic properties
item.description: Article by Dirk Hollenwäger, Niklas Kölbl, Alexander Nitzer, Valentin Bockmair, Andreas J. Kornath DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/znb-2024-0072

item.title: Two further members of the triclinic lanthanoid(III) chloride oxoarsenate(III) series Ln 3Cl2[AsO3][As2O5] with Ln = Eu and Gd
item.description: Article by Dirk Hollenwäger, Niklas Kölbl, Alexander Nitzer, Valentin Bockmair, Andreas J. Kornath DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/znb-2024-0089

item.title: The structure and properties of monoprotonated propiolamide and diprotonated cellocidin
item.description: Article by Dirk Hollenwäger, Niklas Kölbl, Alexander Nitzer, Valentin Bockmair, Andreas J. Kornath DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/znb-2024-0047
